pet.name: Murphy
pet.breedColor: rescue mutt with the lopsided grin

memories.quirks: the way you tilted your head when I said your name
memories.favoriteRitual: our walk before coffee, every morning
memories.favoriteSpots: the spot by the back door where the sun hit at 4pm
memories.lastGoodDay: the last good Saturday, when you stole half my toast and slept in the sun all afternoon
memories.whatIKeep: your collar on the hook, the dent you left in the couch
memories.nicknames: Murph, Mr. Murph, the worst dog
